title: InsightFinder raises $15M to help companies figure out where AI agents go wrong
snippet: According to CEO Helen Gu, the biggest problem facing the industry today is not just monitoring and diagnosing where AI models go wrong, it's diagnosing how the entire tech stack operates now that AI is a part of it.

title: Anthropic Updates Opus 4.7, Its Most Powerful AI Model
snippet: Anthropic PBC introduces an updated version of its AI model, Opus 4.7, which the company says is better at software engineering and hard coding. A more advanced AI offering, Mythos, has been in the news since Antrhopic…
contentText: Anthropic PBC introduces an updated version of its AI model, Opus 4.7, which the company says is better at software engineering and hard coding. A more advanced AI offering, Mythos, has been in the news since Antrhopic says it’s too dangerous to be released to the general public. Bloomberg’s Ed Ludlow reports.

title: Pragmata PC performance tested: 18 GPUs take us to the Moon
snippet: Capcom's Pragmata blends strategic gunplay and split-second puzzle solving for a fresh and fun adventure on the Moon. Oh, and everything is 3D printed. We tested 18 different GPUs for rasterization, ray tracing, and pat…
contentText: Capcom's Pragmata blends strategic gunplay and split-second puzzle solving for a fresh and fun adventure on the Moon. Oh, and everything is 3D printed. We tested 18 different GPUs for rasterization, ray tracing, and path-traced performance to find the best way to play.

title: Ben McKenzie Slams Crypto Risks
snippet: Ben McKenzie, actor, director and producer of the new documentary "Everyone is Lying to You For Money" is tearing into the crypto industry, arguing it thrives on speculation, avoids regulation, and enables massive crimi…
contentText: Ben McKenzie, actor, director and producer of the new documentary "Everyone is Lying to You For Money" is tearing into the crypto industry, arguing it thrives on speculation, avoids regulation, and enables massive criminal activity. He joined Bloomberg Open Interest with a warning that as crypto becomes more embedded in the financial system, the risks could spill over into the real economy, setting the stage for a crisis eerily similar to the one it claimed to replace. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: A beginner's guide to GPU virtualization: passthrough, vGPU, and MIG
snippet: What every IT generalist needs to know before deploying GPU workloads, and why the platform matters more than the hardware. Partner Content GPU workloads are no longer the exclusive territory of research labs and hypers…
contentText: What every IT generalist needs to know before deploying GPU workloads, and why the platform matters more than the hardware. Partner Content GPU workloads are no longer the exclusive territory of research labs and hyperscalers. Engineering teams, data science groups, healthcare organizations, and financial services businesses are all deploying GPU-accelerated infrastructure for AI inference, simulation, visualization, and virtual desktops. For many IT teams, this is new ground. The hardware is familiar, because NVIDIA GPUs fit in standard server slots. But the software isn't.…

title: Introducing Anthropic’s Claude Opus 4.7 model in Amazon Bedrock
snippet: AWS launches Claude Opus 4.7 in Amazon Bedrock, Anthropic's most intelligent Opus model for advancing performance across coding, long-running agents, and professional work. Claude Opus 4.7 is powered by Amazon Bedrock's…
contentText: Today, we’re announcing Claude Opus 4.7 in Amazon Bedrock , Anthropic’s most intelligent Opus model for advancing performance across coding, long-running agents, and professional work. Claude Opus 4.7 is powered by Amazon Bedrock’s next generation inference engine, delivering enterprise-grade infrastructure for production workloads. Bedrock’s new inference engine has brand-new scheduling and scaling logic which dynamically allocates capacity to requests, improving availability particularly for steady-state workloads while making room for rapidly scaling services. It provides zero operator access—meaning customer prompts and responses are never visible to Anthropic or AWS operators—keeping sensitive data private. According to Anthropic, Claude Opus 4.7 model provides improvements across th…

title: Meta raises Quest 3 and Quest 3S prices due to RAM shortage

title: Nvidia Pushes ‘Cost Per Token’ as Defining Metric for AI Data Centers

title: Learn How to Leverage New Tech, Says Franklin Templeton CEO

contentText: Jenny Johnson, Franklin Templeton CEO, says companies need to embrace new technology such as artificial intelligence. She also talks about the importance of securing core data, the state of the consumer and oil prices. She speaks on "Bloomberg Surveillance" live in Washington. (Source: Bloomberg)
